sentences.arabic: حِينَ يَسْمَعُ الوَالِدَانِ الطِّفْلَ يَشْعُرُ بِالْأَهَمِّيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada roditelji slušaju dijete, ono se osjeća važno.
sentences.translationEn: When parents listen to the child it feels important.

sentences.arabic: قَعَدَ الأَبُ مَعَ ابْنِهِ وَسَأَلَهُ عَنْ يَوْمِهِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je sjedio sa sinom i pitao ga o danu.
sentences.translationEn: The father sat with his son and asked him about his day.

sentences.arabic: حَكَى الِابْنُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِفَرَحٍ وَثِقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sin je pričao sve sa radošću i samopouzdanjem.
sentences.translationEn: The son told everything joyfully and confidently.

sentences.arabic: الاسْتِمَاعُ هَدِيَّةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ نُعْطِيهَا لِمَنْ نُحِبُّ.
sentences.translation: Slušanje je veliki dar koji dajemo onima koje volimo.
sentences.translationEn: Listening is a great gift we give to those we love.
